overall.description: A first-person driving sequence through Cyberpunk 2077's Night City outskirts, beginning in an industrial zone with massive arch structures, transitioning through elevated highway interchanges with futuristic billboards, and ending on a desert road approaching a massive stadium complex with holographic towers visible against the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wasteland transitioning to highway underpass

events.description: driving from open industrial yard into covered highway underpass
merging onto main highway from entry ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial debris field and merging onto the main highway

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete arch frameworks dominating the industrial skyline
tall corporate tower with visible logo signage
concrete ceiling and walls of the highway tunnel structure
concrete safety barriers with red painted edges

segments.scene_description: The sequence opens in a post-industrial wasteland with massive concrete arch structures and scattered debris. The camera vehicle drives forward, passing under a large highway overpass and merging onto a multi-lane road, transitioning from the open industrial zone into the covered highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with digital billboards

events.description: exiting underpass into open highway with directional signage visible
passing under overhead gantry with SOCAL and SANTO DOMINGO directional signs

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway, passing digital billboards and directional signs

entered.detail: overhead metal structure displaying SOCAL and SANTO DOMINGO directions with arrows
large digital screens displaying colorful anime character advertisements
upper level of the highway interchange casting shadows below

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the underpass into bright sunlight on an elevated highway. Large directional signs for SOCAL and SANTO DOMINGO span the road ahead, while vibrant anime-style billboards line the right side. The highway stretches forward with multiple lanes and moderate traffic flow.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete canyons

events.description: entering shadow of massive overpass structure, lighting dims significantly
exiting the covered interchange into open desert landscape

agents.ego_description: navigating through the complex interchange, steering through curves under multiple overpass levels

entered.detail: complex concrete highway structure with multiple crossing levels and ramps
massive concrete columns holding up the elevated highway decks
arid terrain with dry grass and sparse vegetation becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a complex concrete interchange with massive support pillars and multiple levels of overpasses creating a canyon-like effect. Light filters through gaps in the structure above. As the vehicle progresses, the right side opens up to reveal desert landscape, transitioning from urban infrastructure to arid outskirts.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with wind turbines and exit ramps

events.description: taking exit ramp from main highway onto smaller desert road
passing large red CONSOLATION billboard, entering remote desert area

agents.ego_description: exiting the main highway onto a desert access road, passing wind farms and sparse traffic

notable_agents.action: white van traveling in adjacent lane before the exit

entered.detail: white windmills scattered across the distant desert hills
large red and white billboard with CONSOLATION branding on metal framework
distant rocky mountains forming the horizon line

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the complex interchange into open desert terrain with clear skies. Wind turbines dot the distant hills. The camera takes an exit ramp, leaving the main highway for a narrower desert road, passing a prominent red CONSOLATION billboard as the urban infrastructure fades behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert approach to massive stadium complex with holographic advertisements

events.description: large futuristic stadium structure becomes dominant feature on horizon
holographic towers and advertisements become visible above the stadium

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive stadium complex on a desert road, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead toward the stadium entrance

entered.detail: massive circular futuristic sports complex with tiered seating structures
tall glowing blue holographic advertisements projecting into the sky
distinctive yellow and black geometric patterned industrial tower

segments.scene_description: The desert road leads toward a massive futuristic stadium complex that dominates the horizon. The structure features elaborate architecture with holographic towers projecting advertisements into the sky. A distinctive yellow patterned industrial tower stands to the right as the vehicle approaches the stadium entrance, with the road curving through the arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a bleak post-industrial wasteland into a sprawling desert landscape dominated by a futuristic stadium. It begins by navigating through massive concrete arches and scattered debris before merging under a highway overpass into a covered infrastructure. As the vehicle emerges into bright sunlight, the scene opens onto an elevated highway lined with vibrant anime billboards and directional signs for SOCAL and Santo Domingo. The camera then moves through a canyon-like concrete interchange of overlapping overpasses, where the urban density gradually gives way to an arid desert horizon dotted with wind turbines. Finally, the vehicle exits the main highway past a red Consolation billboard, curving along a narrow road toward a massive stadium complex featuring holographic towers and a yellow industrial spire.
